patterns_recognized: Stage 1/2 disagree + negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap resolves in Stage-2 direction (5/26 NYY@KC 15-1, 5/29 3-for-3): when f5_full_delta >= 0.12 AND hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap < 0, treat the disagreement as bullpen-carry conviction, not a DOWNGRADE trigger. Relevant to MIA@WSH and SF@MIL.

bullpen_fatigue is a stake-size reducer, not a directional predictor (5/25 lesson confirmed 3 wrong DOWNGRADEs): stress flags suppress financial exposure but have poor direction reversal value. HARD CAP 4 already applies the appropriate score demotion for Stage 1/2 disagree; adding a second DOWNGRADE on top stacks two demotions beyond what the archive supports.

D-grade dual-signal-against (SP xERA AND PQI both opposing pick) is a reliable directional fade — archive shows ~60% directional failure rate (5/20 0-for-4, 5/26 2-for-2, 5/28 3-for-3 correct, 5/25 outlier 0-for-4). KC@CIN (Burns 1.87 xERA edge + PQI +28.0), TEX@STL (deGrom 1.76 edge + PQI -16.8), and COL@LAA (Soriano 2.91 edge + PQI +30.0) all carry this pattern today.

C-grade GOLD without SP or PQI support matches 5/21 process failure (NYM@WSH lost 2-1 as sole staked pick on F3 alone, Cavalli underperformed): apply DOWNGRADE to any C-grade GOLD pick where SP edge opposes pick AND PQI is negative — NYM@SEA fits exactly.

HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold over-fires on otherwise strong stacks (5/30 KC@TEX +0.0019 cost an A-grade capture; 5/28 CHC@PIT +0.0028 similarly): gaps below |0.010| are economically indistinguishable from zero; the cap misfires at these levels without providing genuine bullpen protection.

DET @ TB.reasoning: TB's 65.6% full-game probability relies entirely on a Stage 1/2 bullpen carry (f5_full_delta=0.391 — DET wins F5 at 73.5%). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0042 is near-zero and cannot support that carry. PQI=-4.7 directly opposes TB's late-game profile; confidence_downgrade=True and acute_roster stress add further uncertainty. Edge +1.62pp is outside the [4,15]pp stake band. D-grade (-2) with no F-signal for TB. Heuristic 1 applies (home favorite >65%). No qualitative basis to override the SKIP.

MIA @ WSH.reasoning: HARD CAP 4 correctly demoted WSH from A- (score=4) to B- (score=1) on Stage 1/2 delta + confidence_downgrade — appropriate demotion already applied. F2_xwoba_gap=0.029 and F3_swing_take_gap=7046.3 (strongest F-signal pair on the slate) provide dual-signal directional conviction. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0142 confirms WSH pen is meaningfully better, and the 5/26 archive lesson applies: negative pen gap + high f5_full_delta (0.337) = treat as bullpen-carry conviction, not a DOWNGRADE trigger. bullpen_fatigue is a stake-size reducer per 5/25 lesson, not a directional predictor. B- grade sets appropriately cautious exposure. Alcantara historically vulnerable to quality lineups (ATL@MIA 9-1 on 5/21, 9-3 on 5/20).

KC @ CIN.reasoning: D-grade dual-signal-against: Chase Burns (CIN) holds 1.87 xERA edge over small-sample Avila (KC, min_pa=95), and PQI=+28.0 strongly rejects KC's late-game profile. Stage 1 overwhelmingly favors CIN (wins F5 at 81.8%). Fair_prob=0.348 gives KC only 34.8% — the market prices CIN as a heavy favorite. Edge +19.48pp is in the calibration_caution_18_25pp zone AND outside the [4,15]pp stake band. The D-grade dual-signal pattern has ~60% directional failure rate in the archive. SKIP enforced on all grounds; KC direction treated as structurally unreliable.

SF @ MIL.reasoning: HARD CAP 4 correctly demoted from B+ (score=3) to B- (score=1) on Stage 1/2 delta 0.14 + confidence_downgrade=True. MIL's case is directionally sound: Drohan holds 0.39 xERA edge over Roupp per grade_reasons, PQI=+11.6 confirms MIL's late-game profile, and F3_swing_take_gap=2513.2 fires. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0062 (near-zero but slightly favorable). Per the 5/26 pattern, negative pen gap + f5_full_delta=0.262 = bullpen-carry conviction, not DOWNGRADE. Zero stake enforced via GOLD tier rule. Directional CONFIRM for MIL is appropriate given SP edge and PQI alignment.

TEX @ STL.reasoning: D-grade dual-signal-against: Jacob deGrom (TEX away SP) holds 1.76 xERA edge over McGreevy (STL home) with 29.05% K-rate vs McGreevy's 18.75%. PQI=-16.8 strongly rejects STL's late-game profile. STL model pick at only 50.29% — barely above coinflip — while market prices STL at 46.82% (fair_prob=0.468), confirming TEX as the slight market favorite. Edge +3.47pp is outside the [4,15]pp stake band. DeGrom's SP quality is a qualitative downside risk the xERA metrics may underweight given his return-to-form track record. CONFIRM the D-grade SKIP; STL direction treated as structurally questionable.

COL @ LAA.reasoning: Worst grade on slate (score=-4). Soriano (LAA home SP) holds 2.91 xERA edge over Freeland (COL away) with 26.91% K-rate — the strongest SP quality opposition on today's slate. PQI=+30.0 strongly rejects COL's late-game profile. Stage 1/2 extreme disagree (delta=0.332): LAA wins F5 at 82.6%, COL barely favored full at 50.6%. Fair_prob=0.324 gives COL only 32.4% — market heavily favors LAA. Edge +18.21pp in the calibration_caution_18_25pp zone AND blocked by fair_prob < 0.42 floor. Acute roster flag adds uncertainty. D-grade with maximum signal opposition stack: COL direction treated as structurally wrong per the 60% archive failure rate.

LAD @ ARI.reasoning: LAD (38-21) holds clear team quality advantage over ARI (31-27); market confirms LAD direction at 60.35% fair_prob vs model's 52.12%, validating direction. Rodriguez (LAD away SP) holds F1_xera_gap=0.78* + F2_xwoba_gap=0.039; PQI=-12.3 confirms LAD late-game; Stage 1/2 nearly agree (delta=0.010). HARD CAP 1 correctly fires on -8.22pp negative edge (market more confident than model — do not stake at inferior odds). CONFIRM rescues score from 0 to 1 via HARD CAP 10 logic, though stake remains zero via negative-edge + GOLD tier enforcement. Market direction agreement is the key supporting signal.

NYM @ SEA.reasoning: C-grade with both primary signals opposing SEA: Warren (NYM away, min_pa=79) holds 0.43 xERA edge over small-sample Hancock, and PQI=-3.1 is against SEA's late-game profile. Negative edge -1.84pp means market already prices SEA at 55.5%, leaving no model value. Confidence_downgrade=True. Per 5/21 archive lesson (NYM@WSH C-grade GOLD CONFIRM lost 2-1 as sole staked pick — F3 alone was insufficient without SP or PQI support), C-grade GOLD without SP quality agreement or positive PQI is a DOWNGRADE trigger. SEA's hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.009 is the only support signal — insufficient to override dual opposing signals at C-grade.

CHW @ MIN.reasoning: CHW probable SP not yet announced (confirmed via MLB API: no probablePitcher returned for CHW away). MIN's SP is confirmed but evaluating the matchup requires CHW's Statcast profile (100+ pitches minimum per protocol). No directional signal is possible without both starters' data. PENDING_SP_DATA protocol correctly prevents any stake commitment. Archive validates this threshold: 5/29 PIT walkoff, 5/26 PIT 12-1 blowout both occurred in games where thin SP data would have produced random directional exposure.
